Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product pages, promotions, and brand messaging to inform email content generation.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI agent handling inquiries, product questions, and support for R1 Concepts customers.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching input keywords, retrieving channel data, subscriber counts, and recent content.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Cross-references discovered creators on Instagram to retrieve follower counts, post frequency, and audience engagement data.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves qualified creator profiles, outreach sequences, and prompt templates stored in Drive documents and sheets.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails to each qualified creator from the designated brand email account.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends AI-drafted negotiation responses to creator replies and logs the full conversation thread for ongoing context.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Reads the MHM vehicle data and cross-references it against the New Availability Guide to identify matching part numbers and build the load sheet.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates email copy for new product launch announcements and monthly recap emails using product data and brand voice guidelines as inputs.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and email performance data for the reporting period.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC sales transaction data including customer purchase history, order frequency, product categories, and revenue by account.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen containing the latest Super Session Saturday content.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized B2B blog content targeting DFC's core audiences — shops, distributors, and fleets — based on keyword strategies and content briefs.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday video formats, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images and Wikimedia Commons, and retrieves vehicle specs and history from Wikipedia to build a research package for the target vehicle.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the Claude-generated script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using a selected AI voice profile.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword ranking data, impressions, clicks, and average position for all DFC blog URLs.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors task and project activity across the workspace to identify updates, blockers, or status changes.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark a formatted Excel file showing what DFC stocks for the requested vehicle and clearly flagging what is missing from inventory.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a polished, actionable catalog file directly to Mark within minutes of submission, eliminating what would otherwise be a manual multi-step lookup process.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, including on-hand quantity, on-order quantity, and in-transit status.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, reclaiming hours of team time every week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the existing backorder report with the live Dream inventory data, appending status columns and flagging any parts with no available source as dead-ends.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into a fully enriched, actionable report that tells the team exactly where each part stands without any manual updates.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for affected backorder items, pre-populated with the live status data and ready for review or direct send.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Cuts the time to notify customers from hours of individual outreach to a single review step, improving response time and customer experience simultaneously.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor fitments by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitive fitment reference in minutes that would take a researcher days to compile manually across three separate catalog sites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts to identify which fitments DFC already covers and which are gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly highlights where DFC has competitive coverage and where catalog expansion opportunities exist, informing product and purchasing decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to customers to gather demand data on the identified fitment gaps, asking which vehicles they need two-piece rotors for.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real demand signals from the market without any manual outreach effort, feeding better data into the catalog expansion decision.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped fitment data, DFC cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into a single formatted output sheet for Dino to review.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a clean, decision-ready catalog document that consolidates multiple data sources, giving Dino everything needed to prioritize new rotor fitments in one place.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad copy across every campaign and ad set, extracting the full text of each active ad for phrase-level inspection.
Meta Investigation.impact: Covers the entire active ad library in one automated scan, ensuring no flagged phrase slips through regardless of how many campaigns are running.

Meta Investigation.action: Reviews all extracted ad copy against the specified target phrases and identifies every exact match, noting the ad ID, field, and verbatim copy where each match appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Replaces a manual read-through of potentially hundreds of ads with an instant, exhaustive phrase audit that catches every instance without human error.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted flagged list showing every ad where a target phrase was found, including the campaign, ad set, field name, and the exact copy containing the match.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, actionable compliance or review report directly to the requester so issues can be addressed immediately without additional digging.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the resume and applicant details from each email, and routes them into the workflow.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures every incoming application is captured and processed immediately without a human monitoring the inbox, so no candidate falls through the cracks.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to an organized folder in Google Drive, named and filed by applicant name and role for easy retrieval.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a clean, searchable applicant file archive automatically, replacing ad hoc email attachment storage with a structured document system.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the requirements of the open role it was submitted for, producing a hire/deny/pause recommendation with a brief rationale.
Resume Bot.impact: Cuts initial screening time to near zero and gives the hiring team a prioritized, reasoned shortlist instead of a raw pile of applications to sort through.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant, their score, decision, and status to a Sheets dashboard with a dedicated Pending tab for candidates held for paused roles, while Gmail sends auto-reply emails to denied or no-resume applicants.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a live, organized view of the entire applicant pipeline and ensures every candidate receives a timely response — protecting candidate experience at scale.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is running strong with 56 total agents across the team — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While it was a quieter week on the tracking side, our growing base of completed agents continues to run and deliver value daily, weekly, and monthly across email marketing, paid media, creator outreach, SEO, and operations. Great momentum heading into the weeks ahead as we push the remaining in-progress builds toward completion!
